title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Katakuri, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I fight you, I remind myself why, when faced with an obvious power-up,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Essen- Tial to just shut up and observe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I haven't underestimated you in the slightest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap! If I get crushed by that amount of Mochi, I'll be buried alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sorry for finishing things up like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was starting to get a little peeved.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because I was tied up dealing with you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I missed my Merienda* today by 40 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were so very worried about what was to come of your snack time today!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been standing at the ready since 3, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are so very sorry that you, Lord dogtooth, being the perfectionist you are, were forced to reschedule the Merienda. You so punctilliously enjoy at the same time every day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as for the black tea, what with 40 minutes passing since it was prepared, it's gone completely cold, and...

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
